# cirro_project (Resource)

Manages a Cirro project.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Cirro-hosted project (minimal)
resource "cirro_project" "hosted" {
  name               = "My Research Project"
  description        = "Genomics analysis project for the Smith lab."
  billing_account_id = cirro_billing_account.example.id

  # Up to 10 contacts. At least one required.
  contacts = [
    {
      name         = "Jane Smith"
      organization = "Acme Corp"
      email        = "jane@example.com"
      phone        = "+1-555-0100"
    }
  ]

  settings = {
    # --- Budget (required) ---
    # Spend limit for the period. Must be > 0.
    budget_amount = 500
    # Period the budget resets: MONTHLY, QUARTERLY, or ANNUALLY.
    budget_period = "MONTHLY"

    # --- Storage (optional) ---
    # How long (days) datasets are retained before expiry. Default: 7.
    retention_policy_days = 30
    # How long (days) temporary/scratch storage persists. Default: 14.
    temporary_storage_lifetime_days = 14

    # --- Features (optional) ---
    # Enable automated S3 backup for project data. Default: false.
    enable_backup = true
    # Enable SFTP access to project storage. Default: false.
    enable_sftp = false

    # --- Compute quotas (optional) ---
    max_spot_vcpu           = 256
    max_gpu_vcpu            = 0
    max_fpga_vcpu           = 0
    max_workspaces_vcpu     = 96
    max_workspaces_gpu_vcpu = 0
    max_workspaces_per_user = 10
    max_shared_filesystems  = 5
    enable_advanced_gpu_config    = false

    # --- Access controls (optional) ---
    enable_custom_workspace_roles = true
    is_discoverable               = false
    is_shareable                  = false
    is_ai_enabled                 = false
  }

  # --- Governance (optional) ---
  # Attach data classification IDs to enforce compliance requirements.
  # classification_ids = [cirro_classification.phi.id]

  # --- Tags (optional) ---
  # Free-text labels shown in the Cirro UI.
  # tags = ["genomics", "smith-lab"]
}

# BYOA (Bring Your Own Account) project
resource "cirro_project" "byoa" {
  name               = "BYOA Research Project"
  description        = "Project running in our own AWS account."
  billing_account_id = cirro_billing_account.example.id

  # Up to 10 contacts. At least one required.
  contacts = [
    {
      name         = "Jane Smith"
      organization = "Acme Corp"
      email        = "jane@example.com"
      phone        = "+1-555-0100"
    }
  ]

  # --- Cloud account (required for BYOA) ---
  # account_type and account_id cannot be changed after creation.
  account = {
    account_type = "BYOA"
    account_id   = "123456789012"
    account_name = "my-aws-account"
    region_name  = "us-east-1"
  }

  settings = {
    # --- Budget (required) ---
    budget_amount = 500
    budget_period = "ANNUALLY"

    # --- Storage (optional) ---
    retention_policy_days           = 30
    temporary_storage_lifetime_days = 14

    # --- Features (optional) ---
    enable_backup = true
    enable_sftp   = false

    # --- Encryption (optional) ---
    kms_arn = "arn:aws:kms:us-east-1:123456789012:key/mrk-abc123"

    # --- Network (required for BYOA) ---
    vpc_id            = "vpc-0abc123def456"
    batch_subnets     = ["subnet-aaa", "subnet-bbb"]
    workspace_subnets = ["subnet-ccc", "subnet-ddd"]

    # --- Compute quotas (optional) ---
    max_spot_vcpu           = 256
    max_gpu_vcpu            = 0
    max_fpga_vcpu           = 0
    max_workspaces_vcpu     = 96
    max_workspaces_gpu_vcpu = 0
    max_workspaces_per_user = 10
    max_shared_filesystems  = 5
    enable_advanced_gpu_config    = false

    # --- Access controls (optional) ---
    enable_custom_workspace_roles = true
    is_discoverable               = false
    is_shareable                  = false
    is_ai_enabled                 = false
  }

  # --- Governance (optional) ---
  # Attach data classification IDs to enforce compliance requirements.
  # classification_ids = [cirro_classification.phi.id]

  # --- Tags (optional) ---
  # Free-text labels shown in the Cirro UI.
  # tags = ["genomics", "smith-lab"]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `billing_account_id` (String) Billing account identifier.
- `contacts` (Attributes List) Project contacts (1-10). Each contact must have name, organization, email, and phone. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--contacts))
- `description` (String) Project description.
- `name` (String) Project name (3-100 characters).
- `settings` (Attributes) Project settings. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--settings))

### Optional

- `account` (Attributes) Cloud account configuration (required for BYOA projects). account_type and account_id cannot be changed after creation — modifying them requires replacing the project. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--account))
- `classification_ids` (List of String) Data classification identifiers.
- `tags` (List of String) Project tags.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) Timestamp the project was created (ISO 8601).
- `created_by` (String) User who created the project.
- `deployed_at` (String) Timestamp the project was last deployed (ISO 8601).
- `id` (String) Project identifier.
- `organization` (String) Organization the project belongs to.
- `status` (String) Project status.
- `status_message` (String) Additional status detail.
- `updated_at` (String) Timestamp the project was last updated (ISO 8601).

<a id="nestedatt--contacts"></a>
### Nested Schema for `contacts`

Required:

- `email` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `organization` (String)
- `phone` (String)


<a id="nestedatt--settings"></a>
### Nested Schema for `settings`

Required:

- `budget_amount` (Number) Budget amount (must be > 0).
- `budget_period` (String) Budget period: MONTHLY, QUARTERLY, or ANNUALLY.

Optional:

- `batch_subnets` (List of String) Subnet IDs used for batch compute (BYOA projects).
- `dragen_ami` (String) AMI used for DRAGEN instances.
- `enable_advanced_gpu_config` (Boolean) Whether advanced GPU configuration is enabled.
- `enable_backup` (Boolean) Enable backup for the project.
- `enable_custom_workspace_roles` (Boolean) Whether custom workspace roles are enabled.
- `enable_dragen` (Boolean) Whether DRAGEN acceleration is enabled.
- `enable_sftp` (Boolean) Enable SFTP access for the project.
- `is_ai_enabled` (Boolean) Whether AI features are enabled.
- `is_discoverable` (Boolean) Whether the project is discoverable by other users.
- `is_shareable` (Boolean) Whether datasets in the project can be shared.
- `kms_arn` (String) AWS KMS key ARN for encryption.
- `max_fpga_vcpu` (Number) Maximum FPGA vCPU quota.
- `max_gpu_vcpu` (Number) Maximum GPU vCPU quota.
- `max_shared_filesystems` (Number) Maximum number of shared filesystems.
- `max_spot_vcpu` (Number) Maximum spot vCPU quota.
- `max_workspaces_gpu_vcpu` (Number) Maximum GPU vCPU quota for workspaces.
- `max_workspaces_per_user` (Number) Maximum concurrent workspaces per user.
- `max_workspaces_vcpu` (Number) Maximum vCPU quota for workspaces.
- `retention_policy_days` (Number) Data retention period in days.
- `service_connections` (List of String) Service connection identifiers.
- `temporary_storage_lifetime_days` (Number) Temporary storage lifetime in days.
- `vpc_id` (String) VPC identifier (format: vpc-*).
- `workspace_subnets` (List of String) Subnet IDs used for workspaces (BYOA projects).

Read-Only:

- `has_pipelines_enabled` (Boolean) Whether pipeline execution is enabled.
- `has_shared_filesystems_enabled` (Boolean) Whether shared filesystems are enabled.
- `has_workspaces_enabled` (Boolean) Whether interactive workspaces are enabled.


<a id="nestedatt--account"></a>
### Nested Schema for `account`

Required:

- `account_type` (String) HOSTED or BYOA. Cannot be changed after project creation.

Optional:

- `account_id` (String) AWS account ID (12-digit). Cannot be changed after project creation.
- `account_name` (String)
- `region_name` (String)
